appErrorSubtitle: An error occurred while rendering this page. You can try again or return to a safe area of the system.
notFoundSubtitle: The requested address does not exist, was moved, or is not available in this environment.
privateErrorTitle: Failed to load the private area
privateErrorSubtitle: The panel encountered an unexpected error. You can try again or go back to the dashboard.
privateNotFoundSubtitle: This route does not exist inside the current panel or has been removed.
